source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules - Mission Objectives

objectives.name: Fight Off Opposition
objectives.description: Defeat the enemy force. Hold the field when they break.
objectives.victory_condition: Enemy fails Morale or all eliminated

objectives.name: Deliver Package
objectives.description: Carry an item to the marked objective point.
objectives.victory_condition: Crew member reaches objective with item

objectives.name: Access Terminal
objectives.description: Reach and interact with the terminal to retrieve data.
objectives.victory_condition: Crew member spends 1 action at terminal

objectives.name: Defend Position
objectives.description: Hold the marked position for the battle duration.
objectives.victory_condition: Crew controls position when enemy breaks

objectives.name: Search the Area
objectives.description: Search 3 marked points for the quest item.

objectives.name: Eliminate Target
objectives.description: Eliminate the Unique Individual leading the enemy force.

objectives.name: Secure Supplies
objectives.description: Reach and secure the supply cache before the enemy.

objectives.name: Escort VIP
objectives.description: Escort the VIP safely across the battlefield.
objectives.victory_condition: VIP reaches crew deployment edge alive
